    • Import and Migration Messages
      • Mapping rule MappingRule for entity Entity.Model refers to input field FieldName, which is not found in the entity descriptor in the export file.
      • Mapping rule "MappingRule" for entity Entity.Model refers to output field FieldName, which is not known in the dictionary.
      • Found and removed old repository definitions of model DICT, as they are out-dated
      • Error: Duplicate entity name detected
      • Error: Parent type Type1 is invalid for type Type2
      • Error: Formpic conversion to Struct has detected an error
      • Error: Frames Frame1 and Frame2 are overlapping
      • Error: Dimension information for Object Entity.Model is missing
      • Error: Label with invalid name detected, which cannot be renamed because it is associated with a field
      • Warning: 1000 Entry EntryName from model overwrites definition from component. In future Uniface versions, this will be reversed

    • Messages Reference
      • I/O Message Levels
        • Message Level 1: Store Sequence Messages
        • Message Level 2: DBMS Connector Requests
        • Message Level 4: Return Values from Fetch and Select Connector Requests
        • Message Level 8: Description Block from Open Connector Request
        • Message Level 16: Descriptions From where and order by Clauses
        • Message Level 32: Generated SQL
        • Message Level 64: All System Calls Uniface Sends to Operating System
        • Message Level 128: All Calls to Global Objects and Descriptors
      • Database Connector Requests
        • * Wildcard delete/nullify
        • A Logoff
        • C Commit
        • D Delete
        • F Fetch
        • G Global transaction
        • I Info
        • L Logon
        • M Message
        • N Name table
        • O Open
        • Q Sql
        • R Rollback
        • S Select
        • U Update
        • W Write
        • Z Close
      • Compiler Messages
      • SQL Generation Messages
        • Error: No SQL generated, DBMS driver DB not available.
        • Error: No SQL generated for <Entity.Model>, Entity Descriptor not found.
        • Warning: No SQL could be generated for <Entity.Model>, because the ASN file redirects the entity or the path <$Path> to a different DBMS driver
        • Warning: No SQL could be generated for <Entity.Model>, because the ASN file redirects the entity or the path <$Path> to TCP, and the remote installation failed to connect to the requested database driver.
        • Error: No SQL generated, /genSql does not support driver option <Option> as specified in the assignment file, [DRIVER_SETTINGS], USYS$<DB>_PARAMS.
